summary: Upgrade timesheet project-block approval routing for cross-department collaboration and source-side owner auto-skip.

notes: Project review records are aggregated to one row per timesheet/project block.
PMCC collaboration routing now runs source-side project owner, source-side department owner, then PM-side specialty/project/department owners.
Project owner resolution prefers submitter-side specialty roles such as QS civil, QS MEP, and design consultation.
Ready-node activation now skips a node when the submitter is the resolved assignee, and skips lower duplicate nodes when the next node resolves to the same assignee.
Approval-center project-block status labels now show only the project name on desktop and mobile to avoid wrapped, clipped status text.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with production Vite variables and VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.8.
Run scripts/smoke-collaboration-approval-routing.sql on production in a rollback transaction.
Run deploy/scripts/verify-jwt-keys.sh on the cloud host.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host before deployment.
After deploy, run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.8.
After deploy, run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/ with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.8.
known_warnings: Vite still warns that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
